examples: Analogously, a pattern, distorted or not, can be thought of as having a certain degree of energy.
Analogously, if we could relax the sugar constraint by one unit, the objective function would improve by 0.075.
Analogously, we also have the 1 (4,000 pounds) to 3 (11,333.333 ounces plus 666.667 ounces) proportion for Brute.
Analogously, a hot cup of coffee will always cool down if left - it will never draw warmth from a room to heat back up.
Analogously, students may resort to pattern matching and memorization as they reach the upper levels of learning because they lack the foundational knowledge needed for true understanding.
